news.summary: In a recent development, merchants have the opportunity to integrate ReturnZap's return automation with Ordoro's shipping and inventory tools, providing a more efficient eCommerce workflow. This collaboration, effective May 22, 2025, in Austin, Texas, will allow for seamless operations within the eCommerce sector. Ordoro, renowned for its eCommerce operations software, is at the forefront of this integration, aiming to enhance the efficiency of online businesses. This move is anticipated to positively impact a significant number of merchants and streamline their processes.
news.headline: Ordoro integrates with ReturnZap for streamlined returns. Helps merchants automate returns within eCommerce workflow.

news.summary: During the 2025 National Adult and Influenza Immunization Summit (NAIIS), VaxCare, a top care delivery platform for vaccines, shared findings from a recent study. The research, which reviewed close to 850,000 administrations, validated the success of co-administration strategies, highlighting their effectiveness in immunization practices.
news.headline: VaxCare showcases co-administration strategy results at NAIIS with study of 850,000 administrations, confirming effectiveness.

news.summary: In April 2025, the Miami-Dade County saw a significant increase in condominium sales valued at $1 million and above, with a surge in double digits compared to pre-pandemic levels. At the same time, there was a continued rise in affordable condominium transactions in the area. The rise in high-end condominium sales contrasted with the upward trend in more affordable housing purchases, reflecting a diverse real estate market in Miami-Dade County. The figures indicate a strong real estate market in the county, with transactions in different price ranges showing growth and stability.
news.headline: Miami-Dade County sees a surge in $1M+ condo sales, doubling pre-pandemic numbers, with affordable condos also on the rise.

news.summary: Slingr, a Florida-based enterprise software developer, has recently announced the launch of IntelliParse.ai, an advanced AI agent designed to convert unstructured documents into organized and actionable business data. This innovative technology is set to revolutionize data management by automatically parsing and interpreting information. The introduction of IntelliParse.ai on May 22, 2025, aims to streamline business processes and improve efficiency. This cutting-edge AI solution will enable companies to seamlessly translate complex data sets, leading to enhanced decision-making capabilities.
news.headline: Slingr launches IntelliParse.ai, AI tool converting unstructured docs into business data in Miami, May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Intuit Inc. reported a robust performance in the third quarter, particularly driven by the remarkable growth in its TurboTax Live division. CEO Sasan Goodarzi described it as a groundbreaking year for the tax preparation product, noting a 47% surge in TurboTax Live revenue and a 24% increase in customers utilizing the AI-powered service. This uplift contributed to the overall revenue of the Consumer Group, where TurboTax Live operates, reaching $4 billion. Goodarzi highlighted the strong adoption of the product by Intuit's expansive customer base of almost 100 million users globally. This information was shared during the earnings call on Thursday.
news.headline: Intuit Inc. CEO highlights 'breakthrough adoption year' for TurboTax Live with 47% revenue increase to $4 billion.

news.summary: Chinese Vice Foreign Minister Ma Zhaoxu and U.S. Deputy Secretary of State Christopher Landau had a phone conversation, as per China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs. Both sides agreed to maintain communication. The talk occurred as the 90-day U.S.-China trade truce approaches its deadline. Former U.S. Ambassador to Russia, Michael McFaul, criticized the lack of direct communication between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping as "horrible." Since Trump's pre-inauguration call on Jan. 17, the leaders have not spoken directly. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: China and US reconnect through diplomatic lines as Trump and Xi remain silent. Vice FM Ma Zhaoxu and US Deputy Secretary of State Landau agree to maintain communication. U.S.-China 90-day trade truce deadline nears. Leaders Trump and Xi haven't spoken since Jan. 17 call.

news.headline: SUNMI opens its first North American store in Atlanta on May 22, 2025, offering smart IoT solutions.

news.summary: Swedish health tech company H100 Group AB saw its shares rise by 37% after announcing its first purchase of Bitcoin worth 4.39 BTC for 5 million Norwegian krone ($490,830) at an average price of around $111,785. This move helped the company recover some losses, with its shares having fallen by over 46% in the previous two months. The company's CEO, Sander Andersen, believes that Bitcoin aligns well with the values of individual sovereignty and the customers they target. On the other hand, China's Jiuzi Holdings revealed its plan to stack 1,000 Bitcoin over the next year, with its CEO acknowledging the volatility but aiming to strengthen the firm's assets. Jiuzi Holdings' stock rose 7.3% to $3.09 following the announcement. The trend of adopting Bitcoin as a treasury asset is growing, with 109 public firms now holding cryptocurrency on their balance sheets.
news.headline: Swedish health firm surges 37% after 5M NOK Bitcoin buy. China's EV seller aims for 1K BTC stack. Bitcoin treasury trend grows. Magazine explains allure.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. (NYSE: GRDN) has disclosed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The offering involves 7,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock, priced at $21.00 per share. Of these shares, 6,059,553 will be sold by specific selling stockholders, while 1,440,447 shares will be issued and sold by Guardian as part of a non-dilutive "synthetic secondary" transaction. This announcement comes in the midst of market fluctuation and aims to raise substantial capital for the company's future endeavors.
news.headline: Guardian Pharmacy Services prices underwritten public offering of 7.5M shares of Class A stock at $21 per share.

news.headline: Chenbro showcasing AI server chassis solutions at COMPUTEX 2025 in Taipei; making significant appearance. #TWSE: 8210

news.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies saw significant gains on Thursday, with Bitcoin rising by 1.30% to $111,396.80, Ethereum surging by 3.81% to $2,686.39, and Dogecoin climbing by 2.67% to $0.2474 at 9:30 p.m. ET. Bitcoin almost hit $112,000, part of a record rally, while Ethereum increased by 4% raising its market dominance to 9.3%. Bitcoin's monthly gains were over 18%, while Ethereum saw a rise of over 47% in May. Over $300 million was liquidated from the cryptocurrency market in the last 24 hours, with shorts receiving the most impact. Bitcoin's open interest remained stable, while Ethereum experienced a 9% jump. The news attributed the sluggishness in stocks to President Donald Trump's tax bill-induced debt fears. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin flirts with $112,000, Ethereum and Dogecoin spike. Cryptocurrency gains: Bitcoin +1.30% $111,396.80, Ethereum +3.81% $2,686.39, Dogecoin +2.67% $0.2474. Stocks flat amid debt concerns. Bitcoin up 18% in May, Ethereum up 47% month-to-date. Over $300 million liquidated in last 24 hours, with shorts hardest hit. Ethereum sees 9% jump in funds.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on May 22, 2025, the seventh installment of a competition highlighting essential skills for productivity and sustainability in the transport industry took place. news.headline: Volvo Trucks Driver Challenge promotes productivity and sustainability in transport; Mr. Fatorrahman from Indonesia wins Off-Road Category.

news.summary: Outgoing CFTC Commissioner Summer Mersinger stated that regulatory approval for crypto perpetual futures contracts in the US could come "very soon." These contracts allow traders to speculate on cryptocurrency prices without owning them and can be held indefinitely, with high leverage trading. Currently not allowed in the US, they are mainly traded on offshore exchanges such as Binance, OKX, and Bybit. Binance, the largest among them, handles almost $95 billion in daily perpetual trading volume across over 500 pairs with leverage up to 125x. Mersinger emphasized the importance of having these derivatives regulated domestically, which she believed would be beneficial for both the markets and the industry as a whole. She highlighted the recent procedural vote for the GENIUS stablecoin bill as a positive sign for the industry's future in the US. Mersinger will be leaving the CFTC to join the Blockchain Association, advocating for the crypto industry. She praised the incoming CFTC chairman's crypto industry-friendly stance and expressed her desire to contribute more to the industry through her new role.
news.headline: CFTC's Mersinger anticipates approval for US crypto perpetual futures soon. Binance tops with $95B daily volume. Source: YouTube.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 3.8%. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding analyst expectations. The manufacturing sector saw the most significant growth, with a 2.5% increase in production. Average hourly wages also increased by 3.2% compared to the previous year. These positive economic indicators have led to increased optimism among consumers and investors.
news.headline: Trump's ban on foreign students fuels Harvard legal battle.

news.summary: The recent data released indicates that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the latest figures showing a rise to 6.8%, which is higher than the previous 5.5%. Additionally, the number of job losses in the last month alone has reached 2.1 million. This sudden spike in unemployment is unprecedented and has raised concerns about the overall economic stability. Experts believe that the ongoing pandemic is the primary cause of this sharp increase in job losses and unemployment rates. Efforts are being made to address this issue and provide support to those who have been adversely affected.
news.headline: Trump's foreign student ban intensifies legal battle at Harvard., over 1000 international students affected.

news.summary: A first-in-human clinical study is set to commence this year in Shanghai and San Diego. Duality Biotherapeutics, listed as HKEX:09606, will be collaborating with Avenzo Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing advanced oncology treatments. The study, set to be conducted in phases 1 and 2, marks a significant milestone for the companies involved in this partnership.
news.headline: FDA clears IND for novel EGFR/HER3 bispecific ADC AVZO-1418/DB-1418. Phase 1/2 study to start in 2025, by Duality Biotherapeutics partner Avenzo.

news.summary: Trung Nguyen, operating an unlicensed money-transmitting business named National Vending from September 2017 to October 2020, was sentenced to six years in prison by a Boston federal court. He was ordered to forfeit $1.5 million. Nguyen converted over $1 million to Bitcoin without registering with FinCEN as per Anti-Money Laundering regulations. His methods involved converting cash into Bitcoin for scam victims and a drug dealer. Nguyen avoided detection by using a fake vending machine business as a front. He was caught after meeting undercover cops in person to exchange cash for Bitcoin, taking a 5% commission. Nguyen was charged with operating an unlicensed money transmitting business and two counts of money laundering, convicted on one money laundering charge, pleading not guilty to all charges.
news.headline: Bitcoin launderer sentenced to 6 years in prison, must forfeit $1.5M. Ran unlicensed business under fake vending cover. Source: Pacer.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion as of the end of last year. The study also reveals that the total number of COVID-19 cases worldwide has surpassed 200 million, with over 4 million deaths attributed to the virus. Additionally, the data shows that more than 4.6 billion vaccine doses have been administered globally in an effort to combat the pandemic. The figures highlight the ongoing impact of COVID-19 on a global scale and the widespread vaccination efforts being made to mitigate its effects.
news.headline: Meituan and Xiaomi of China focus on long-term growth efforts; highlights include expansion plans.

news.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court made a significant ruling strengthening presidential control over independent federal agencies, except for the Federal Reserve. In a decision issued on Thursday, the court granted a stay allowing President Donald Trump to dismiss members of the National Labor Relations Board and the Merit Systems Protection Board without justification. However, the Federal Reserve was excluded from this ruling. The Court specified that the debate over the constitutionality of removal protections without cause does not extend to the Federal Reserve, considering it a distinctively structured, quasi-private institution with roots in the heritage of the First and Second Banks. For further details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Supreme Court limits Trump's authority to fire independent agency members, except for Federal Reserve due to its unique structure.

news.summary: NVIDIA has broken a world record by achieving an impressive inference speed exceeding 1,000 TPS per user. This milestone was accomplished by utilizing Blackwell GPUs along with Llama 4 Maverick, showcasing a remarkable advancement in AI model performance.
news.headline: NVIDIA hits record 1,000 TPS/user using Llama 4 Maverick & Blackwell GPUs, setting new AI model performance standard.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the COVID-19 pandemic has affected over 10 million people worldwide, resulting in more than 500,000 confirmed deaths. These numbers reflect the global impact of the virus, with numerous countries struggling to contain its spread. Additionally, the economic repercussions of the pandemic are evident, with unemployment rates soaring and businesses facing significant challenges. The situation remains fluid, with health officials advising continued adherence to safety guidelines to curb further transmission of the virus.
news.headline: Northern Sydney area hit by floods, claiming four lives. Further rainfall expected. Stay updated on the latest news.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.8%. The economy added a total of 531,000 jobs in the most recent month, surpassing expectations. This increase in job creation is believed to be driven by a surge in hiring across various industries, including hospitality, manufacturing, and healthcare. The positive trend in employment numbers suggests a continued recovery from the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on the labor market.
news.headline: Brazil imposes taxes on remittances, causing Real to drop. This is to boost the budget. - Source: Bloomberg - @Bloomberg #Brazil #Real #taxes
